title: Executive Order 8329—Waiver of the Time Limitations in Civil Service Rule IX To Permit the Reinstatement of Van C. Brodrick to a Position as Rural Carrier in the Post Office at Marysville, Kansas

flags.justification: A narrow, specific waiver of a procedural time limit under an existing statutory waiver authority.
The order is explicitly 'recommended by the Postmaster General and concurred in by the Civil Service Commission' — a real, multi-party sign-off process for this individual correction.
A personnel action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A one-time corrective reinstatement, not an ongoing authority grant.
This corrects a prior erroneous administrative action rather than removing oversight — the order's own text explains the employee had been dropped from the rolls on an 'erroneous ground.'
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, individual-specific corrective action.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A genuine administrative correction: the order's own recitals explain the employee had been dropped from the rolls in error.
